title: feat: mark gemini embedding 2 as paid-only
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: The great embedding shuffle
gist.blurb: We've swapped our default embedding model to OpenAI's text-embedding-3-small so free-tier requests keep flowing without a hitch. Gemini 2 has moved to the premium garden for our heavy pollinators.
gist.summary: Switched the default API embedding model to openai-3-small to maintain seamless free-tier access, while transitioning gemini-2 to a paid-only tier.
gist.impact: API requests to /v1/embeddings without a specified model will now automatically route to OpenAI's text-embedding-3-small, ensuring free users are never blocked.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee organizing glowing data crystals (representing embeddings) into different wooden sorting bins. The robot companion helps by holding a shiny premium gem.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot organizing glowing blue and purple data crystals into a wooden sorting box. A chunky retro robot companion with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a shiny pixelated gem. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
